title: Trust Architecture for Decentralized Identity
preview: Sketching out the trust layer for Solstone. The core idea is that identity verification shouldn't depend on a single authority — it needs to be distributed and composable.

title: Book Rec from Nadia
preview: Nadia recommended Governing the Commons by Elinor Ostrom over coffee today. Relevant to what we're building with Solstone.

title: Betaworks Call Prep
preview: Meeting with David Park from Betaworks on Thursday. Need to cover key points about composable trust signals, the protocol layer, and identity providers.

title: Stream Processing Patterns
preview: Documenting the patterns we keep reaching for. These are emerging from actual implementation, not theoretical.
